core_philosophy: Authority, clarity, and truth. 95% of UI is monochrome. Color exists exclusively to signal Hype Scores (1-5) and primary actions. Content should feel like a high-end financial or journalistic terminal.

typography.strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist'. Heavy, black headings paired with sterile, highly legible body text.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-zinc-950
scales.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight text-zinc-900

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.component_padding: p-6 lg:p-8 for cards and containers to prevent text collision

surface_styles.global: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Heavy use of border-b and border-r.
surface_styles.cards: Flat solid background, 1px solid border-zinc-200, NO soft shadows. Sharp corners or max rounded-sm (2px). Hover state: border-zinc-900.
surface_styles.header: Solid white background with a hard 1px bottom border (border-zinc-200). Sticky positioning, z-50.
surface_styles.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. Solid black (bg-zinc-950 text-white) for primary, transparent with 1px black border for secondary. Hover: invert or subtle gray.

component_instructions.HypeBadge: Use strict color coding from hype_scores palette. Sharp pill or square shape. Use IBM Plex Mono for the score number. Example: 'border border-red-500 bg-red-100 text-red-900 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase'
component_instructions.CheckThisInput: Massive, terminal-like input. 2px solid black border, large padding (p-6 or p-8), large text (text-2xl). Must feel like a command line or prominent search bar.
component_instructions.NewsFeedItem: Grid layout. Date/Time on left, Hype Badge in center or top right, Headline prominent, 2-line AI summary in text-secondary. Minimalist, high contrast.
component_instructions.StoryClusterView: Side-by-side comparison. Use a multi-column grid where each column represents a different source's take on the same event, highlighting their distinct hype scores.
component_instructions.PredictionGraveyard: Table or dense list format (Control Room density). Clear status badges: Pending (Gray/Blue), Proved True (Green), Proved False (Red).
component_instructions.DailyDigest: Editorial layout. Like a high-end newsletter. Focus on typography, massive drop caps, single column reading experience.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hard cuts or very fast transitions (100ms). Change border colors to black, text colors to black. No bouncy scaling.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: High contrast 2px outline with 2px offset (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-zinc-900).
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Minimalist fade in. No excessive parallax.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract technological spiral for background accents.

article_image_1.description: Black and white robot illustration for AI news placeholder.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case, role-based names (e.g. data-testid='hype-filter-button', data-testid='check-url-input').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds.
